info.english_meaning: to pass through air to fly
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vihAyasA gatO qINo qayate qIyate pade ' (Slo. 20) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: '(pAtAnAM Satam-) uqqInamavaqInaM ca praqInaM qInameva ca' (BA0 karRa0 4126-28)
